title: Device Settings - List of supported settings vs UI headset spec
scenario: Verify that the Lens app's headset settings list matches all supported headsets from the headset UI specification.
steps: 1) Acquire the UI spec of the tested headset.
2) Open the app and navigate to headset settings.
3) Compare the settings list against the headset spec.
expected: All supported headsets for mobile from the spec are present in the Lens app.
